evals.prompt: Please organize my photos from this trip and rename them with descriptive names.
evals.expected_output: A renamed/ subfolder containing 8 files named YYYYMMDD - Erfurt - NNN - <description>.jpg. The two Haus zum Breiten Herd shots (_G915626 and _G915627) should be detected as duplicates. Event name 'Erfurt' detected from folder '202604 - Erfurt'.

assertions.name: renamed_folder_created
assertions.description: A renamed/ subfolder is created inside the working directory

assertions.name: correct_file_count
assertions.description: renamed/ contains exactly 8 files (same as input)

assertions.name: filenames_start_with_date
assertions.description: All files in renamed/ start with 20260403 (the EXIF date)

assertions.name: duplicate_marked
assertions.description: One file is marked as a duplicate (duplicate 2 or Duplikat 2)

assertions.name: originals_untouched
assertions.description: The 8 original files still exist in the source directory

evals.prompt: Bitte benenne meine Fotos um und gib ihnen deutsche Beschreibungen was auf den Fotos zu sehen ist.
evals.expected_output: A renamed/ subfolder with 8 files. Descriptions are in German. Event name 'Erfurt' detected. Duplicate detected.

assertions.name: german_descriptions
assertions.description: File descriptions appear to be in German (contain German words like 'Ansicht', 'Brücke', 'Fassade', 'Fluss', etc.)

evals.prompt: Can you rename the photos in this folder for me? Use English descriptions.
evals.expected_output: A renamed/ subfolder with 3 files. Event name 'Mallorca' detected from folder '2026-07 Mallorca'. Date extracted as 20260403 from EXIF. English descriptions used.

assertions.name: filenames_start_with_date
assertions.description: All files start with a YYYYMMDD date prefix
